name: St Johns Community Bus Inc
recent_news: No public footprint located. Saint Johns, MI student transportation is served by St. Johns Public Schools' in-house transportation department (Dir. Rob Gleeson) and community transit is provided by Clinton Transit/The Blue Bus; Dean Transportation also has a Saint Johns location. 'St Johns Community Bus Inc' may be a dormant or very small entity (3 employees, ~$109K revenue) with no website or phone listed.
fit_notes: Not actionable as a tuck-in based on available evidence. Sub-scale shell/sole-prop with no contracts or fleet verifiable; competing transit options (Clinton Transit, Dean Transportation) already serve the area. Recommend desk-disqualify unless Summit has a list of MI district contracts that name this entity.

name: Canby Lancers Bus Svc Inc
recent_news: Named after Canby Lancers (Canby Public Schools mascot, ISD 891); appears to be the long-standing local contractor for Canby Public Schools. Shares PO Box 69, Hanley Falls MN 56245 with Fulda Bus Svc Inc, suggesting common ownership/management with another single-district contractor. No M&A or news coverage located; not listed among Palmer Bus Service's 28 MN locations.
fit_notes: Likely small family-run single-district contractor (Canby Public Schools). Co-located mailing with Fulda Bus Svc implies a small multi-entity owner that could be acquired together. Sub-scale economics (3 employees, ~$108K rev) suggest a low-priority outreach; could be a bolt-on into a Western MN cluster if Summit builds a footprint there.

name: Fulda Bus Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: likely Fulda Public Schools (ISD 505) or surrounding SW MN districts
recent_news: Mailing address PO Box 69, Hanley Falls MN 56245 is shared with Canby Lancers Bus Svc Inc — strongly implies common ownership of two small SW MN contractors. Note Fulda MN itself (zip 56131) is separately served by Witzel Bus Service (203 Hwy 59 N, Fulda); Fulda Bus Svc Inc with a Hanley Falls mailing address is a distinct entity. No website, phone, or M&A coverage located.
fit_notes: Sub-scale (3 employees, ~$108K rev) single-district contractor that appears paired with Canby Lancers Bus Svc under common owner. Of interest only as part of a multi-entity tuck-in in SW Minnesota; standalone too small to move the needle. Confirm exact district contract(s) and owner identity via MN Secretary of State filings before outreach.

name: Tap Bus Sys Of ILLINOIS Inc
recent_news: MISCLASSIFIED in source list. Legal name 'TAP Business Systems of Illinois, Inc.' — a Savin/Ricoh authorized office-equipment dealer (copiers, printers, MFPs) based in Pana, IL, founded 1984, serving 19 central Illinois counties. Not a school-bus, motor-coach, or pupil-transport operator. Phone (217) 567-5027 matches TAP Business Systems.
fit_notes: DISQUALIFY — not an operator. This is a copier/office-equipment dealership inadvertently captured by a NAICS or keyword filter ('Bus Sys' = 'Business Systems'). Remove from Summit target universe and flag the underlying data source for similar false positives.

name: Rick Evans Transportation Inc
recent_news: Active interstate passenger carrier (USDOT 2376797), 13 power units / 8 drivers per most recent MCS-150 filing (06/2025; 115,000 mi in 2024). DBA 'Evans Transportation' and also referenced historically as 'Dole Transportation.' D&B estimates ~$750K revenue and ~14 employees. Based at 422 Allen St, Yreka, CA 96097. No M&A or PE-ownership signals located — appears independently owned.
fit_notes: Genuine small independent school/charter operator in far-northern California (Siskiyou County). Owner-operator (eponymous Rick Evans) with ~13 buses suggests a classic succession-driven tuck-in candidate, but geography is remote and isolated from any current Summit footprint — low strategic fit unless Summit is intentionally building a NorCal/OR-border cluster. Worth a confirmatory call to identify the contracted districts and owner age before deeper diligence.
